name: Canopy
author: Poki
description: Canopy is a platforming game where you have to grapple and shake your way around the jungle to get to the goal! In over 20 challenging levels, you will have to try to gather as much fruit as possible, without hitting the bugs or falling out of the trees. This classic Flash game is now back in HTML 5 so you can play it whenever you like! Can you help Canopy get through the jungle? How to play Canopy? Use the mouse to climb around! Who created Canopy? Canopy is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: canary, Sandman and Gunbrick How can I play Canopy for free? You can play Canopy for free on Poki. Can I play Canopy on mobile devices and desktop? Canopy can be played only on your computer.
